case_title: V C EGG COMPANY VS. FORKLIFT LLC, A LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-17-2018 - JUDGMENT.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF V C EGG COMPANY

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,200.29 FILED BY V C EGG COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT FORKLIFT LLC, A LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY DBA THE LODGE ON HAIGHT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-29-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF V C EGG COMPANY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FORKLIFT LLC, A LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY DBA THE LODGE ON HAIGHT $2,200.00 PRINCIPAL, $150.00 INTEREST, $110.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,460.00, DEFENDANT DID NOT APPEAR. PLAINTIFF ESTABLISHED THAT DEFENDANT BREACHED CONTRACT BY FAILING TO PAY FOR DELIVERIES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-29-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO MAY-17-2018 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 PLAINTIFF VC EGG COMPANY IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY STEVEN HERRERA, PRESIDENT. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. PROOF OF SERVICE IS DEFECTIVE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR (STEVEN HERRERA, PRES.) FILED BY PLAINTIFF V C EGG COMPANY

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - (FEE FOR SERVICE: $60.00) SERVED FEB-15-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT FORKLIFT LLC, A LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY DBA THE LODGE ON HAIGHT
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - (FEE FOR SERVICE: $60.00) SERVED MAR-14-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT FORKLIFT LLC, A LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY DBA THE LODGE ON HAIGHT
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM COMMISSIONER FILED BY V C EGG COMPANY

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-17-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-17-2018 BY PRO TEM DAVID LAVINE . PLAINTIFF V C EGG COMPANY IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY STEVEN HERRERA, PRESIDENT. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
